channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Threatens to Strike Iranian Bridges or Power Plants for Each Ship Attack
item.description: President Trump warned on Wednesday that he would destroy an Iranian bridge or power plant, including in Tehran, for every Iranian attack on a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: House Democrats indifferent to DSA primary challenge against Thanedar
item.description: House Democrats are unlikely to publicly mourn if Rep. Shri Thanedar loses to his Democratic Socialists of America challenger next month.

item.title: Scoop: "Regime Change" sells 500,000, on track for 2026 nonfiction bestseller
item.description: "Regime Change," the exposé on Trump's second term by Haberman and Swan, has sold 500,000 copies, heading toward becoming a top nonfiction book of 2026.

item.title: Gold sector sees surge in mergers and acquisitions
item.description: NovaGold Resources plans to acquire the remaining 40% stake in Donlin Gold Holdings, creating a company valued at...
